SQLLite.SQL: SELECT TO_CHAR(NWD.NON_WORKING_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Day" FROM NON_WORKING_DAYS NWD WHERE NWD.NON_WORKING_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(${param.receiptDate},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(${param.processingDate},'YYYY-MM-DD') AND NWD.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N'

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
